info.name: PayToday Notifications Service API
info.description:
REST API for email and SMS notifications. **Endpoints:** Invitations (`/email/invitation`), Business lifecycle (`/email/business/registration`, `created`, `activation-request`, `activation-approved`, `activation-rejected`), Payments (`/email/payment-request`, `bulk-payment-request`, `bulk-payment-confirmation`, `transaction-notification`), Vouchers (`/email/voucher-redeemed`, `voucher-redeemed/business`, `voucher-redeemed/customer`), plus custom email, password-reset, and SMS. All except health require API key: `X-API-Key` or `Authorization: Bearer <key>`.

Contact Support:
 Name: PayToday

request.description: Returns service health status. Does not require authentication.
Send a pre-formatted invitation email to join a business. Does not require the user to exist. Use recipientName, or firstName+lastName, or customerName for the recipient.

  "declaredIncome": 20000,
  "extractedAverage": 15000,
  "variancePercent": 33.3,
  "isAgentApplication": false
}

request.description: Send an email with full control over content (subject, html, text, cc, bcc, attachments). Validated by schema: to (email or array), subject (1–200 chars), optional html, text, cc, bcc, attachments.
